name: Turkey-Orange Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey, celery, salt, and curry powder in a bowl.
2. Peel and chop the orange.
3. Add the chopped orange, grapes, and mayonnaise to the turkey mixture.
4. Gently toss all ingredients together.
5. Sprinkle the shredded coconut on top just before serving.
Recipe details:
1/4 recipe = 17 calories, 3 lean meat + 1 fruit exchange
12 grams carbohydrate, 21 grams protein, 10 grams fat
228 mg sodium, 391 mg potassium, 58 mg cholesterol
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
